_comment: The scan registry. SAFETY GATE: every entry carries expectSymbol; if the on-chain symbol() does not match, the scanner publishes NOTHING for the entry and flags it for human review — a wrong address must never produce a published grade for the wrong contract. New entries by reviewed PR only. Addresses below were seeded from research and are verified by that gate on the first live scan.

tokens.name: USD Coin
tokens.notes: Fiat stablecoin — pausable/blacklistable/upgradeable by design and disclosed. Category profile for stablecoins (redeemability) is a methodology v0.2 item; until then the raw structure scores under the standard profile with this note shown.

tokens.name: Wrapped Ether
tokens.notes: Canonical Base predeploy. Wrapped-asset profile (derivative trust) is a v0.2 item.

tokens.name: Coinbase Wrapped Staked ETH
tokens.notes: Custodial liquid-staking wrapper (Coinbase). Same v0.2 custodial-profile note as cbBTC.

tokens.name: Dai Stablecoin
tokens.notes: Bridged representation of DAI on Base, graded on its Base contract structure (bridge/admin-controlled), not on mainnet DAI. The wrapped/bridged (derivative-trust) profile lands in methodology v0.2.

tokens.name: Coinbase Wrapped BTC
tokens.notes: Custodial wrapped asset (Coinbase). Pausable/blacklistable by design and disclosed by the issuer; the custodial-asset profile lands in methodology v0.2 — until then the standard profile understates it and the report carries this note.

tokens.name: ATA Coin
tokens.notes: Pre-deployment; address placeholder. PERMANENT RULE: when ATA deploys, this entry stays coi:true — Assay publishes ATA's raw dimension facts but never a grade. The operator of Assay is ATA's founder. See COI-POLICY.md.
